content.text:
[Mon 2026-04-20 13:47 UTC] Shape Sort in `repo/` is too hard to use on phones because the drag targets are too small.

Use the git checkout in `repo/` to get this hotfix onto `review/shape-sort-mobile-hotfix` and push that review branch to the local `origin`.

arguments.command: find /root/.openclaw/workspace/repo -maxdepth 3 -type f | head -50 && echo "---" && git -C /root/.openclaw/workspace/repo remote -v && git -C /root/.openclaw/workspace/repo branch -a

content.text:
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Shape Sort</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
  </head>
  <body>
    <main class="shape-sort-board"></main>
    <script src="game.js"></script>
  </body>
</html>
Observed on tablet: Shape Sort tiles are hard to grab unless the finger lands almost perfectly on center.
Clear picture. The tiles are 72px with only 6px drag padding — too small for fat fingers. I'll bump the tile size and drag padding to phone-friendly values, then get that onto the review branch.

arguments.command:
git -C /root/.openclaw/workspace/repo add public/games/shape-sort/style.css public/games/shape-sort/game.js && git -C /root/.openclaw/workspace/repo commit -m "hotfix: increase shape-sort tile size and drag padding for mobile

Tiles: 72px → 96px (CSS + config)
Drag padding: 6px → 16px
Border-radius scaled proportionally (18px → 24px)

Fixes grab targets being too small on phones/tablets."

content.text:
[review/shape-sort-mobile-hotfix 1a136e2] hotfix: increase shape-sort tile size and drag padding for mobile
 2 files changed, 5 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)

details.aggregated:
[review/shape-sort-mobile-hotfix 1a136e2] hotfix: increase shape-sort tile size and drag padding for mobile
 2 files changed, 5 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)

content.text:
Done. Here's what landed on `review/shape-sort-mobile-hotfix`:

| | Before | After |
|---|---|---|
| Tile size | 72×72 px | 96×96 px |
| Drag padding | 6 px | 16 px |
| Border-radius | 18 px | 24 px (scaled) |

The tile size change is in both `style.css` (visual) and `game.js` (`shapeSortConfig.tileSizePx`) so the drag hit-test stays in sync with what's rendered. Branch is pushed to `origin` and ready for review.
